prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: NPT-BIOHAZARDKNIVES-4PC Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Biohazard Throwing Knives Stainless Steel Double Edged Carry Case Description: Practice your zombie hunting skills with the ASR Outdoor 4pc Biohazard Throwing Knife Set.

This set of throwing knives comes with 4 blades of different colors (blue, green, red and yellow), all of which are constructed of 440 stainless steel that wont rust so you can use them rain or shine. They each feature a cord wrapped handle for added comfort and grip during use to prevent slippage. The blades themselves have an overall length of 9" with the blade length being 4.5".

The blades are all double edged to ensure that they'll stick wherever you throw them. They come with a nylon carry pouch that has individual slots to protect the knives when not in use. It features a hook and loop closure and it folds flat for easy storage and travel when not in use. This is a must-have set of throwing knives for zombie hunters and knife collectors. Search Terms: throwing stars blades japanese style knives outdoor collectible Features: - COOL BIOHAZARD DESIGN - Each Knife Features Biohazard Insignia | Great Gift for Zombie Hunters and Knife Collectors - DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - Blades Made of 440 Stainless Steel that Wont Rust | Use Rain or Shine - COMPACT DESIGN - 9" Overall Length, 4.5" Double Edged Blades | Will Stick Where Thrown | Ideal for Target Practice - CORD WRAPPED HANDLE - Each Blade Has Wrapped Handle for Added Comfort and Grip | Prevents Slippage - CARRY POUCH - Comes with Black Nylon Carry Pouch to Protect Blades When Not in Use | Perfect for Storage and Travel === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 4-pc Biohazard Throwing Knives Stainless Steel

anthropic.title_differentiation: 4 Double Edged Blades, 440 Stainless Steel, Cord Wrapped Handle, Nylon Carry Pouch, Multi-Color Set

openai.title_differentiation: 440 Stainless Steel, Double Edged, Cord Wrapped Handles, Nylon Carry Pouch, Four Color Set, 9" Overall Length
